surface: Report-quality to SpecForge and NextRail chain
trigger: User asks ShipGuard to test read-only report output, evaluate usefulness, convert the weakness into a native plan/goal, and keep the ShipGuard improvement loop going.

requiredPhrases: If implementation needs planning, feed this report-quality output into ios spec-workflow with --from-report

prepareFiles.text:
# Workflow Chain Synthetic Source

## ShipGuard Evaluation Boundary

This public synthetic report is ShipGuard-only process evidence. It does not inspect or authorize target-app work.

## Result

- Verdict: REVIEW: Synthetic workflow-chain source report needs a SpecForge handoff.
- Proof source: public synthetic workflow-chain fixture
- Why it matters: The development loop should turn report-quality questions into tasks, validation, and slash handoffs without manual interpretation.
- Next command: `./bin/shipguard ios spec-workflow --path fixtures/demo-ios-repo --feature "ShipGuard Workflow Chain Receipts" --from-report <report-quality-dir> --out <spec-dir> --shipguard-eval --shareable`
- Next action: Feed this report-quality output into SpecForge and then generate the next goal.

## Report Quality Questions

- Can ShipGuard prove report-quality questions become SpecForge tasks and next slash plans without manual interpretation?

commands.display: ./bin/shipguard ios spec-workflow --path fixtures/demo-ios-repo --feature "ShipGuard Workflow Chain Receipts" --from-report <receipt-out>/quality --shipguard-eval --shareable --out <receipt-out>/spec

requiredPhrases: Can ShipGuard prove report-quality questions become SpecForge tasks and next slash plans without manual interpretation?

commands.display: ./bin/shipguard next-goal --release 0.0.0 --title "ShipGuard Workflow Chain Receipts" --scope "Add workflow-chain receipts to value-gauntlet." --completion-evidence "Validated the chain from report-quality to spec-workflow and next-goal." --following-title "ShipGuard Scenario Matrix Receipts" --out <receipt-out>/next/NEXT_GOAL.md
